---
title: "Wordbank MB-CDI Function Word Trajectories"
author: "Masoud Jasbi"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r packages, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(feather)
library(brms)
library(ggeffects)
library(ggrepel)
```

# Load Data

```{r processedEnglishTokens}
english_tokens_processed <- read_feather("../processed_data/english_tokens_processed.feather")

english_tokens_contract_processed <-
read_feather("../processed_data/english_tokens_contract_processed.feather")
```

# Load MB-CDI Function Word Data

```{r}
cdi_data <- 
  read_csv("../raw_data/wordbank_functionword_trajectories.csv") %>%
  gather("word", "proportion", a:how)

#write_csv(cdi_data, "../processed_data/cdi_functionwords.csv")
```

```{r functionWordPlots}
cdi_data <- read_csv("../processed_data/cdi_functionwords.csv")

# Get the last point for each line
last_points <- cdi_data %>%
  group_by(word) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = age, n = 1)

# Plot with labels at the end of each line, avoiding overlap
ggplot(cdi_data, aes(x = age, y = proportion, colour = word)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_text_repel(data = last_points, aes(label = word), 
                  nudge_x = 1, # Horizontal nudging for clarity
                  direction = "y", # Allow vertical adjustment
                  color = "black", # Label color
                  show.legend = FALSE) + # Suppress legend
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 14), legend.position = "none") +
  labs(x = "Age (Months)", y = "Proportion")
```

```{r}
library(wordbankr)
```

```{r}
# replicate the above graph from the R API
# get all the data
eng_ws_data <- get_instrument_data(language = "English (American)",
                                   form = "WS",
                                   administration_info = TRUE,
                                   item_info = TRUE)

# filter it down to just child_id, item_definition, produces boolean, age
wordbank_df <- eng_ws_data %>% select(item_definition, age, produces, child_id)

# clean item_definition column
wordbank_df$item_definition <- trimws(tolower(wordbank_df$item_definition))

# get just the function words
func_wordbank <- wordbank_df[wordbank_df$item_definition %in% function_words,]

# Calculate proportion of children producing each word at each age
word_proportions <- func_wordbank %>%
  group_by(item_definition, age) %>%
  summarise(
    total_children = n_distinct(child_id),
    children_producing = sum(produces == TRUE),
    proportion = children_producing / total_children,
    .groups = 'drop'
  )
  
# plot
ggplot(word_proportions, aes(x = age, y = proportion, color = item_definition)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of Children Producing Each Word by Age",
    x = "Age (months)",
    y = "Proportion of Children",
    color = "Word"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),      # Smaller text
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),    # Smaller title
    legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm")          # Smaller legend keys
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 2))       # Two columns in legend

```

## Onset Age of Production Estimates

```{r}
CDI_onset_age <- 
  cdi_data %>%
  group_by(word) %>%
  summarise(
    age_above_0.1 = min(age[proportion >= 0.1], na.rm = TRUE),
    age_above_0.15 = min(age[proportion >= 0.15], na.rm = TRUE),
    age_above_0.2 = min(age[proportion >= 0.2], na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
CDI_onset_age %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = age_above_0.15, y = reorder(word, age_above_0.15))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = age_above_0.1, xmax = age_above_0.2)) +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14), xlab = "age") + 
  labs(x = "Age (Months)", y = "") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(min(CDI_onset_age$age_above_0.15), max(CDI_onset_age$age_above_0.15), by = 1))
```
